name: map-parser
description: Extract and analyze navigation database config — reads nav DB version, map regions, configured paths, and FSC activation state. Read-only.
author: dspl1236
scripts: map_parse.sh - Dump acios_db.ini, navdb metadata, FSC activation state
notes: Inspired by the MapConfigParser.html tool in jilleb/mib2-toolbox. Harman navigation uses the same acios_db.ini format across MMI3G and MIB2 generations, so the underlying data is similar even though the firmware versions differ. This module extracts the metadata; the companion HTML viewer in the MMI3G-Toolkit web app can render it.
